_comment: SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0. Curated, source-grounded list of the environment / system-property configuration keys the framework-agnostic bootstrap recognises. Source of truth: the string literals consumed against ConfigReader.read() in AgentForge4jBootstrap (applyConfig / parseModelTierOverrides) and LlmClientWiring. ConfigReader is an internal generic passthrough with no key list, so this surface cannot be auto-extracted; this fixture is maintained by grounding. The generator soft-validates each entry's `builderMethod` against the emitted bootstrap-config.json. Env normalisation (ConfigReader): AGENTFORGE4J_<NAME> has its prefix stripped and '_' replaced with '.', lowercased — so it can only produce dot-separated lowercase keys and CANNOT produce a hyphen; hyphenated keys are therefore system-property-only. System properties win over environment variables on collision.

keys.description: Filesystem directory of agent definitions (or blank to skip filesystem agent loading).
Filesystem directory of workflow definitions (or blank to skip filesystem workflow loading).
Filesystem directory of integration definition JSON (or blank to skip integration loading).
Filesystem directory the file sink writes generated artifacts to.
Whether the LLM response cache is enabled.
Maximum nested-workflow depth. System-property only (the key contains a hyphen, which the environment-variable normalisation cannot produce).
Whether the shipped (built-in) agents are loaded. System-property only (hyphenated key).
Whether the shipped (built-in) workflows are loaded. System-property only (hyphenated key).

prefixes.description: Per-provider, per-tier model override (e.g. agentforge4j.llm.model-tiers.openai.standard=gpt-...). The tier segment is the part after the final dot and must match a ModelTier constant (case-insensitive). System-property only (the prefix contains a hyphen).

Per-provider LLM client configuration consumed by LlmClientWiring (e.g. api.key, base.url, default.model, connect.timeout — all dot-separated, matching LlmClientWiring's own canonical lowercase-dotted form). These leaves are unrelated to the Spring Boot starter's hyphenated equivalents (api-key, base-url), which are bound separately via Spring's relaxed Binder and never pass through ConfigReader/LlmClientWiring.
